user_system_path: Right-now cards: state-change triggers. Slice 1 ships the copy/verbiage scrub changing morning brief/daily card terminology to Right Now; Slice 2 decouples card generation from the clock.
allowed_files_raw: Workday-presence trigger evaluator, trigger route integration, current-state route/model updates, focused right-now tests, and the required source-truth ratchet
forbidden_files_raw: No auth/stripe/billing work, no schema migrations, no new connectors, no landing-copy sweep, no broad cron rewrite outside the right-now trigger path
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npx vitest run app/api/workday-presence/__tests__/route.test.ts app/api/workday-presence/__tests__/triggers-route.test.ts lib/workday-presence/__tests__/model.test.ts lib/workday-presence/__tests__/source-backed-state.test.ts lib/workday-presence/__tests__/triggers.test.ts lib/workday-presence/__tests__/trigger-runner.test.ts
required_browser_proof: Manual: load /dashboard and verify the Right Now card remains present while Slice 2 trigger wiring is introduced; no dead setup fallback returns
acceptance_condition: Right Now card generation is no longer clock-only; trigger evaluation can produce the current workday-presence state through the workday-presence route/trigger surface with focused proof and no dead setup fallback
stop_condition: Stop when Slice 2 trigger/runtime work is proven on the authorized workday-presence surface, the Right Now card is no longer clock-shaped, and focused proof plus source-truth closeout are posted
anti_regression_checks: workday-presence GET still returns a card or justified quiet state
trigger route honors justified state-change inputs
no dead setup fallback returns for the owner path
next_command: Implement #244 Slice 2 by wiring state-change triggers into the workday-presence route/trigger surface, then prove the Right Now card is no longer clock-shaped
